data.name: Doll Grabber
data.detailed_description:
Hi everyone! This is a casual puzzle game that simulates a claw machine.

In this game, you can experience a relaxing time.

Move the joystick to press the button and collect the plush toys!

The first 15 are fixed rewards in the level, the remaining need to be obtained through random catch in free mode

The acquired dolls can be viewed on the collection shelf.

There are a total of 10 levels, with a total of 30 cute dolls of the same style waiting for you to acquire!

Operation guide/manual

Move the grabbing claw by using the buttons or joysticks on the machine.

Position and adjust to move the claw to a suitable position so that it can clamp the target object when grabbing it.

When the claw is in the ideal position, press the button, and the claw will descend and try to clamp the target object.

Once the target object is clamped, the claw will start to rise, bringing the object out of the claw machine to get the doll.

Game features

The game difficulty is casual level, which is suitable for players who do not want to spend too much effort to pass the game.

I hope everyone will like this game.

After clearing customs, you can experience various exquisite character illustrations as a reward.

data.short_description: "Doll Grabber" is a casual puzzle game that simulates a claw machine. Players need to grab a specified number of dolls in each level. Come and challenge yourself!
data.supported_languages:
簡體中文, 英文, 日文*, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows8/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA Gef
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX 11 Sound Device

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows8/10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core i5
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA Gef
  • Storage: 400 MB available space
